description_long: This is a tall, slender vase with a narrow neck and a wider, rounded base, giving it an elegant bottle-like silhouette. The exterior surface features a series of horizontal ridges or grooves that spiral subtly around the body, adding tactile and visual texture. The vase is finished in a deep, matte black or very dark brown color, which gives it a modern and understated appearance. The opening at the top is small and circular, suitable for holding a single stem or a minimalist floral arrangement. The material appears to be ceramic or stoneware, with a solid, weighty feel. There are no visible decorative embellishments beyond the ribbed texture, emphasizing a minimalist, contemporary design.
description: A tall, slender, ribbed vase with a matte dark finish and a minimalist, modern design. Its narrow neck and textured surface make it suitable for simple floral displays.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full height and ribbed texture, with the narrow neck and rounded base clearly visible.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated, this view highlights the subtle spiral of the grooves and the consistent dark coloration.
description_view_2: Another side view, similar to the front, emphasizing the vase's symmetry and vertical proportions.
description_view_3: This angle shows the opposite side, with the ribbed texture and matte finish remaining prominent.
